overview: A premium, romantic wedding invitation website for Abhay and Monika featuring animated sections, live countdown timer, event timeline, gallery, and auto-playing music.
features: Animated hero section with couple names and hashtag
Auto-playing 'Aaj Sajeya' with visible music toggle
Live countdown timer to the wedding day
Events timeline for Haldi, Lagan, Sangeet, Bhaat, and Wedding
Couple profile cards with family details
Venue cards with Google Maps links
RSVP contact section with clickable phone numbers
